# HABiesie — Lighting Domain Contract
#
# Generated by: Live file audit (claude.ai session)
# Date:         2026-04-16

#

# actually does, its dependencies, known bugs, and design decisions.
###############################################################################

---

## Section 1: Domain Overview

The lighting system is presence-aware, time-aware, and context-driven.
All automations read from central context sensors rather than implementing
their own time/presence logic. The architecture is sound and mostly correct.

### Core Design Principle
```
Context sensors (night/presence/trust/mode)
    → Scene definitions (what lights = what state)
        → Automation triggers (when to apply scenes)
            → Departure/arrival cleanup (always run after events)
```

### Central Context Consumed by Lighting
```
binary_sensor.night_confirmed        ← primary night gate (confidence ≥ 60)
binary_sensor.civil_night            ← evening routine trigger
binary_sensor.anyone_connected_home  ← WHO IS HOME (AP-based, authoritative)
binary_sensor.quiet_arrival_mode     ← night + bedrooms occupied
binary_sensor.low_trust_present      ← maid/contractor on site
binary_sensor.bedrooms_occupied      ← kids asleep check
binary_sensor.bar_occupied           ← bar presence
binary_sensor.office_occupied        ← office presence
binary_sensor.garage_occupied        ← garage presence
binary_sensor.living_areas_occupied  ← morning trigger
input_boolean.bedtime_mode           ← set by kids/full bedtime automations
input_boolean.entertaining_mode      ← suppresses tier 3 door alerts + lighting
input_boolean.holiday_mode           ← modifies bedtime schedule
sensor.security_lighting_intent      ← security engine drives security lights
sensor.security_movement_path        ← security engine path for area lights
binary_sensor.security_lighting_allowed ← hard block during daylight
```

### Presence Entity Clarification (IMPORTANT)
```
binary_sensor.anyone_connected_home  ← USE THIS — AP-based, reliable
binary_sensor.anyone_home            ← HA mobile app geo — UNRELIABLE, do not use
person.*                             ← HA mobile geo — UNRELIABLE for local presence
```

## Section 3: Scene Inventory

All scenes defined in `lighting_scenes.yaml`.

### Security Scenes
| Scene | Lights ON | Lights OFF |
|---|---|---|
| `scene.scene_house_security_lights_on` | car_port, front_house, back_house, main_entrance, office_entrance | — |
| `scene.scene_house_security_lights_off` | — | car_port, front_house, back_house, main_entrance, office_entrance |

### Routine Scenes
| Scene | Lights ON | Lights OFF |
|---|---|---|
| `scene.scene_morning_routine_on` | entrance_down_lights, dining_room, laundry | — |
| `scene.scene_morning_routine_off` | — | entrance_down_lights, laundry, dining_room, pool_patio_down_lights |
| `scene.scene_evening_routine_on` | entrance_down_lights, dining_room | — |
| `scene.scene_evening_routine_off` | — | entrance_down_lights, dining_room, pool_light |

### Event Scenes
| Scene | Lights ON | Lights OFF |
|---|---|---|
| `scene.scene_entertainment_mode` | pool_light, back_house_security, entrance_down_lights, dining_room | — |
| `scene.scene_kids_bedtime` | — | front_house_security, back_house_security, pool_light |
| `scene.scene_full_bedtime` | — | front_house_security, back_house_security, laundry, pool_light, office, dining_room |
| `scene.scene_night_away` | laundry (deterrence), office_entrance | garage, main_entrance, dining_room, pool_light, pool_patio_down_lights, front_house_security, back_house_security |

### Known Scene Gap (BUG)
`scene.scene_night_away` is missing `switch.entrance_down_lights` and
does not explicitly turn off `switch.main_entrance_light` when turned on
by evening routine. See BUG-L02.

## Section 4: Automation Inventory

### Morning Routine (`lighting_morning.yaml`)

| ID | Trigger | Key Conditions | Action |
|---|---|---|---|
| `morning_wake_lights_on` | living_areas_occupied ON | morning_routine_ran_today=off, after weekday/weekend start time | scene_morning_routine_on + optional back security if after second_wake_time, clears bedtime_mode |
| `morning_wake_lights_on_manual` | input_button.morning_routine_on | — | scene_morning_routine_on |
| `morning_wake_wfh_cleanup` | bedrooms_occupied ON | anyone_connected_home=on, hour<8, after sleep_longer_time, morning_routine_ran_today=on | scene_morning_routine_off |
| `morning_routine_daily_reset` | 00:05:00 | — | morning_routine_ran_today = OFF |
| `morning_wake_lights_off_manual` | input_button.morning_routine_off | — | scene_morning_routine_off |

**Gap:** No time-based fallback trigger. Wife without phone → AP never joins → living_areas_occupied may not fire. See BUG-L04.

### Evening Routine (`lighting_evening.yaml`)

| ID | Trigger | Key Conditions | Action |
|---|---|---|---|
| `evening_routine_on_auto` | civil_night ON | anyone_connected_home=on, evening_routine_ran_today=off | scene_evening_routine_on + pool_light if summer, sets ran_today flag |
| `evening_routine_on_manual` | input_button.evening_routine_on | — | scene_evening_routine_on |
| `evening_routine_off` | input_button.evening_routine_off | — | scene_evening_routine_off |
| `evening_routine_daily_reset` | 00:05:00 | — | evening_routine_ran_today = OFF |

### Night Arrival (`lighting_arrival_night.yaml`)

| Scenario | Condition | Lights ON |
|---|---|---|
| Quiet mode | quiet_arrival_mode=on | garage_switch_3, main_entrance, entrance_down_lights, laundry |
| Someone home | anyone_connected_home=on, not quiet | garage_switch_3, main_entrance, entrance_down_lights, pool_patio, front_security, laundry → pool_patio + front_security OFF after 5min if bar not occupied |
| Nobody home | anyone_connected_home=off (BUG: uses anyone_home) | garage_switch_3, main_entrance, entrance_down_lights, pool_patio, dining_room, laundry |

**Bug:** Scenario 3 checks `binary_sensor.anyone_home` (HA geo, unreliable) not `binary_sensor.anyone_connected_home`. See BUG-L03.

### Departure (`lighting_departure.yaml`)

| Scenario | Condition | Action |
|---|---|---|
| Day + maid present | night=off, low_trust_present=on | Log only — lights preserved |
| Day + no maid | night=off, low_trust_present=off | scene_morning_routine_off |
| Night | night=on | scene_night_away |

**Trigger:** `input_boolean.full_departure_detected` to: "on" (missing from: "off" guard).
**Bug:** Neither day nor night scene turns off entrance_down_lights + main_entrance_light
when turned on by evening_routine. See BUG-L01 and BUG-L02.

### Bedtime (`lighting_bedtime.yaml`)

| ID | Trigger | Condition | Action |
|---|---|---|---|
| `kids_bedtime_week` | kids_week_bedtime time OR button | weekday Sun-Thu, holiday=off | scene_kids_bedtime, bedtime_mode=ON |
| `kids_bedtime_weekend` | kids_weekend_bedtime time OR button | Fri-Sat, holiday=off | scene_kids_bedtime, bedtime_mode=ON |
| `kids_bedtime_holiday_override` | either bedtime time | holiday=on | scene_full_bedtime, bedtime_mode=ON |

**Default kids bedtime scene turns OFF:** front_house_security, back_house_security, pool_light.
**Does NOT turn off:** entrance_down_lights, dining_room_light — these stay on from evening routine.
**No confirmation notification** before lights off. See BUG-L05.

### Boundary Security (`lighting_boundary.yaml`)

| ID | Trigger | Action |
|---|---|---|
| `boundary_security_on` | security_lighting_required ON (10s stable) OR button | boundary_street + main_entrance always; + car_port/front/back/office_entrance if someone home |
| `boundary_security_off` | security_lighting_required OFF (5min hysteresis) OR button | All boundary lights off (condition: threat_level=low) |

### Security Lighting Engine (`lighting_security.yaml`)

| Intent | Action |
|---|---|
| `full` | All security lights ON |
| `area` + front path | front_house_security + main_entrance ON |
| `area` + rear path | back_house_security ON |
| `perimeter` | boundary_street_light ON |
| Reset (threat=low for 3min) | car_port/front/back/office OFF; boundary/main_entrance if security_lighting_required=off |

### Presence-Aware Rooms

| Room | File | Trigger | Day action | Night action | Departure |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Garage | lighting_garage.yaml | garage_occupied + door_open | garage_light ON | garage_light + entrance + front_security ON | garage_light OFF after 2min |
| Office | lighting_office_presence.yaml | office_occupied | office_light ON | office + office_entrance + bathroom + laundry ON | office + bathroom OFF; entrance OFF day only |
| Bar | lighting_bar_presence.yaml | bar_occupied (sunset only) | — | back_security ON; Telegram confirm for patio/AppleTV | patio OFF at bedtime if unoccupied |

## Section 5: Helper Inventory

### input_datetime
```
morning_weekday_start         ← morning routine weekday start
morning_weekend_start         ← morning routine weekend start
morning_second_wake_time      ← time after which patio/back light allowed in morning
morning_sleep_longer_time     ← WFH cleanup window start
kids_week_bedtime             ← kids bedtime weekdays (Sun-Thu)
kids_weekend_bedtime          ← kids bedtime weekends (Fri-Sat)
patio_second_wake_time        ← (defined but not referenced — potential orphan)
```

### input_boolean
```
morning_routine_ran_today     ← once-per-day gate for morning
evening_routine_ran_today     ← once-per-day gate for evening
kids_bedtime_enabled          ← (defined but not referenced in automations — orphan)
bedtime_mode                  ← set by bedtime, cleared by morning (lives in context_schedules.yaml)
```

### input_button
```
boundary_security_on/off
morning_routine_on/off
evening_routine_on/off
kids_bedtime_on
full_bedtime_on/off
energy_saving_mode_on/off
entertainment_mode_on         ← (defined but lighting_entertainment.yaml is empty)
```

---

## Section 6: Night Confidence Model

Defined in `context_night.yaml`:

| Condition | Confidence | Binary sensor |
|---|---|---|
| Sun elevation < -18° | 100 | astronomical_night |
| Sun elevation < -12° | 80 | nautical_night |
| Sun elevation < -6° | 60 | civil_night |
| Sun elevation < 2° | 40 | night_early |
| Otherwise | 0 | — |

`binary_sensor.night_confirmed` = ON when confidence ≥ 60 (civil night threshold).
`binary_sensor.civil_night` = ON when elevation < -6° (same as night_confirmed at this threshold).

Evening routine uses `civil_night` as trigger — correct (human behaviour darkness).
Security lighting uses `night_confirmed` — correct (wider gate for safety).

---

## Section 7: Bugs

### BUG-L01 [HIGH] Night departure doesn't turn off entrance lights

**File:** `packages/lighting/lighting_departure.yaml`
**Description:** `scene_night_away` is missing `switch.entrance_down_lights`.
Evening routine turns on entrance_down_lights at civil_night. Night departure
applies scene_night_away which doesn't include this switch — lights stay on
after everyone leaves at night.
**Fix:** Add `switch.entrance_down_lights: "off"` to scene_night_away in
lighting_scenes.yaml. Also add scene_morning_routine_off call after
scene_night_away in departure to catch all internal lights.

---

### BUG-L02 [HIGH] scene_night_away missing main_entrance_light off

**File:** `packages/lighting/lighting_scenes.yaml`
**Description:** `scene_night_away` turns on `laundry` and `office_entrance`
for deterrence but does not explicitly turn off `main_entrance_light`.
Evening routine and boundary automation can turn this on. Night departure
leaves it on.
**Fix:** Add `switch.main_entrance_light: "off"` to scene_night_away.

---

### BUG-L03 [HIGH] Arrival nobody-home scenario uses wrong entity

**File:** `packages/lighting/lighting_arrival_night.yaml`
**Description:** Scenario 1 (nobody home) checks `binary_sensor.anyone_home`
which is the HA mobile app geofence sensor — unreliable for local presence
detection. The authoritative entity is `binary_sensor.anyone_connected_home`
(AP-based). Scenario 1 silently never fires.
**Fix:** Replace `binary_sensor.anyone_home` → `binary_sensor.anyone_connected_home`.

---

### BUG-L04 [MEDIUM] Morning routine has no time-based fallback

**File:** `packages/lighting/lighting_morning.yaml`
**Description:** Morning wake only triggers on `binary_sensor.living_areas_occupied`.
Wife doesn't carry phone → AP doesn't join → anyone_connected_home may be
insufficient for confidence scoring → living_areas_occupied may not reach
threshold. No time-based fallback exists.
**Fix:** Add time trigger at `input_datetime.morning_weekday_start` (weekdays only)
and `binary_sensor.cam14_lounge_motion_valid` as additional trigger paths.
Once-per-day gate handles duplicates.

---

### BUG-L05 [MEDIUM] Kids bedtime turns off entrance/dining lights without confirmation

**File:** `packages/lighting/lighting_bedtime.yaml`
**Description:** scene_kids_bedtime currently only turns off security lights
(front_house_security, back_house_security, pool_light). It does NOT turn off
entrance_down_lights or dining_room_light which are on from evening routine.
Per design: these should turn off at kids bedtime with a 30s mobile notification
confirmation window (cancel button) before acting — and only if the lights
are currently on.
**Fix:** Add entrance_down_lights and dining_room_light to scene_kids_bedtime.
Add pre-notification + 30s cancel window. Add input_button.kids_bedtime_cancel
to helpers.

---

### BUG-L06 [LOW] Departure trigger missing from: "off" guard

**File:** `packages/lighting/lighting_departure.yaml`
**Description:** Trigger on `input_boolean.full_departure_detected` has no
`from: "off"` constraint. Can fire on HA restart if boolean is ON at boot.
**Fix:** Add `from: "off"` to trigger.

---

### BUG-L07 [LOW] input_boolean.kids_bedtime_enabled defined but never used

**File:** `packages/lighting/lighting_helpers.yaml`
**Description:** Helper exists but no automation references it. The bedtime
automations don't check this boolean — they check holiday_mode instead.
Either wire it in as a master bedtime enable/disable or remove it.

---

### BUG-L08 [LOW] input_datetime.patio_second_wake_time defined but not used

**File:** `packages/lighting/lighting_helpers.yaml`
**Description:** Defined but not referenced. `morning_second_wake_time` is
used instead. Either remove `patio_second_wake_time` or wire it up for
the pool patio light specifically.

---

### BUG-L09 [LOW] lighting_entertainment.yaml and lighting_energy_saving.yaml are empty

**Files:** both
**Description:** Both files are empty stubs. `entertainment_mode_on` button
exists in helpers but lighting_entertainment.yaml has no automation to respond.
Energy saving mode button similarly orphaned.
**Fix:** Either implement or remove the helper buttons. Low priority.

---

## Section 8: Cross-Domain Dependencies

| Entity | Provider | Consumed by |
|---|---|---|
| `binary_sensor.night_confirmed` | context_night.yaml | departure, arrival, garage, security lighting |
| `binary_sensor.civil_night` | context_night.yaml | evening routine, office presence |
| `binary_sensor.anyone_connected_home` | presence_core.yaml | departure, arrival, boundary, morning |
| `binary_sensor.quiet_arrival_mode` | context_night.yaml | arrival |
| `binary_sensor.low_trust_present` | context_presence.yaml | departure (maid preservation) |
| `binary_sensor.bedrooms_occupied` | presence_confidence.yaml | bar (quiet mode check) |
| `binary_sensor.bar_occupied` | presence_confidence.yaml | arrival (5min patio delay gate), bar_bedtime_cutoff |
| `binary_sensor.garage_occupied` | presence_confidence.yaml | garage lighting |
| `binary_sensor.office_occupied` | presence_confidence.yaml | office lighting |
| `binary_sensor.living_areas_occupied` | presence_confidence.yaml | morning wake trigger |
| `binary_sensor.security_lighting_required` | security_core.yaml | boundary on/off |
| `sensor.security_lighting_intent` | security_logic.yaml | security lighting engine |
| `sensor.security_movement_path` | security_logic.yaml | security lighting engine area selection |
| `binary_sensor.security_lighting_allowed` | security_core.yaml | security lighting hard block |
| `input_boolean.bedtime_mode` | context_schedules.yaml | bar cutoff, bar wind-down |
| `input_boolean.entertaining_mode` | context_presence.yaml | (consumed by door alerts, not directly by lighting yet) |
| `input_boolean.holiday_mode` | context_presence.yaml | bedtime schedule selection |
| `sensor.season` | HA built-in | evening routine pool light |
| `binary_sensor.cam14_lounge_motion_valid` | cameras_processing.yaml | morning trigger (after BUG-L04 fix) |

---

## Section 9: Design Decisions (Locked)

### 9.1 — AP-based presence is authoritative
`binary_sensor.anyone_connected_home` is the source of truth for who is home.
`binary_sensor.anyone_home` (HA mobile geo) is unreliable and must not be
used in lighting automations.

### 9.2 — Night confidence threshold
`binary_sensor.night_confirmed` (confidence ≥ 60 = civil night) is the
standard gate for all night-mode lighting decisions. Do not use raw
`sun.sun below_horizon` — it fires too early.

### 9.3 — Security lights are not internal lights
Security lights (front_house, back_house, car_port, office_entrance) are
managed by the security lighting engine and boundary automation.
Arrival/departure/bedtime automations may also set these but must not
conflict with the security engine reset logic.

### 9.4 — Departure relies on full_departure_detected boolean
Lighting does not detect departure independently. It reads
`input_boolean.full_departure_detected` set by the presence/boundary system.
If AP disconnect is unreliable, departure lighting may not fire — this is
a presence system problem, not a lighting problem.

### 9.5 — Scenes are the single point of light definitions
All multi-light actions use scenes. Never list individual switches in
automation actions when a scene exists for that purpose. Add lights to
scenes rather than adding them to automation action lists.

### 9.6 — Kids bedtime controls: entrance + dining + security + pool
`scene.scene_kids_bedtime` must turn off:
  - switch.front_house_security_light
  - switch.back_house_security_light
  - switch.pool_light_switch
  - switch.entrance_down_lights     ← added 2026-04-16
  - switch.dining_room_light         ← added 2026-04-16
With 30s mobile confirmation window before acting (cancel button available).

### 9.7 — Once-per-day gates prevent duplicate routine firing
`input_boolean.morning_routine_ran_today` and `evening_routine_ran_today`
are the gates. Both reset at 00:05:00. Multiple triggers (time + AP + motion)
are safe because the gate handles deduplication.
